presentation-description: I am a software engineer with skills in UX / UI design and web development, handling various technologies in this field. I work in a team, with a taste for learning new things and easy adaptation to them. I am supportive and with great skills in my field, such as the design of graphic interfaces.

highlights: Developed web applications with React, Vue.js, and TypeScript focused on user experience
Implemented backend solutions in PHP for scalable systems
Designed user-centered interfaces for internal systems
Validated functional flows with proof-of-concept testing
Managed environments with Docker and Linux
Implemented CMS platforms (Drupal, WordPress, Strapi, Squidex)
Designed mockups and prototypes with Figma and Adobe XD
Developed RPA bots with Automation Anywhere
Developed ERP modules with Vue.js and Laravel

contact.title: Have a project in mind or looking to hire?
contact.description: I'm open to collaborating on web technology projects, solving technical challenges, or joining your development team. Let's talk!

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.desc: Building modern and scalable user interfaces
